tituloPre: We are the implementation arm of
descripcion: As authorized Codeplex partner in Peru, we support Peruvian SMBs on their path to accounting, logistics and tax digitization. We don't write the software — we bring it into your company and make sure it works.

historia.titulo: From artisanal consulting to a regional ecosystem
parrafos: Grupo DGD is the authorized commercial partner of Codeplex Software in Peru. We handle resale and implementation of their cloud suite: ContaPlex, GestiónPlex and SUNAT Electronic Invoicing.
We don't develop the software: we bring it to your company. We handle consulting, parametrization, training and Spanish-language support from Peru.
We work with SMBs in retail, distribution, restaurants, services and logistics — industries where the Codeplex suite has broadest adoption in the country.

cards.d: Commercial and implementation arm in Peru

items.title: Mission
items.desc: Simplify accounting and tax management for Peruvian SMBs, with reliable tech and human support.

items.title: Vision
items.desc: Be Peru's leading implementation partner for companies that want to grow without losing order or compliance.

items.title: Values
items.desc: Closeness, clarity, compliance and continuous learning. We don't sell software: we solve problems.

alianza.descripcion: Codeplex builds LATAM's leading cloud accounting, management and invoicing suite. Grupo DGD is their authorized commercial and implementation arm in Peru.
bullets: Priority access to roadmap and new features
Direct technical support from the dev team
alianza.cardDesc: Cloud accounting and tax suite · LATAM · Over 50,000 companies

equipo.descripcion: Accounting, technology and support consultants. Real people in your timezone.
